specific_question: For the fiscal year 2025, what percentage of the budget afforded to the cybersecurity team at Elexion Automotive was allocated toward R&D purposes to prevent future attacks?
answer: In the fiscal year 2025, roughly 20% of the cybersecurity team's budget was set to be allocated towards R&D purposes in the interest of preventing future attacks.
dr_question: Referencing the information shared in the April 2025 article from Help Net Security, what external cybersecurity market data involving the automotive industry should Elexion Automotive analyze by the end of Q4 2025 to protect consumer data and safety?
